observations: Completed succession plan for Underwriting leadership
Operational restructuring has driven efficiency, dexterity, and alignment in sales, UW, and renewals
BPO (RSP) moving from China to Malaysia in 2027 – transition underway
Expanded distribution and products through integration of Orarius and New Jersey Package into the SES program
Tremendous potential to expand our business offering, enable scale, and introduce new competencies through insurance tracking capabilities
Slip & Fall and bodily injury make up 70% of claims
100% of Animal Bite and 88% of bodily injury Claims are under $25K
NJ, CT and PA (Northeast) make up over 40% of all GL claims
80% of claims fall between $10k and $100k
Melissa Data going live in Q1, will add geocoding for improved address verification
Salesforce implementation planned for late Q2
Actuarial model refresh exercises planned throughout the year
Coherent Spark live for QUBIE as of Nov 2025. Phase two planning underway to move away from hardcoded risk modeling for all products
Broker portal that supports appointments and submissions
Redeveloping and consolidating our portfolio and MF applications into a customer-friendly dynamic webform
Submission Ingestion: Automated data enrichment, completeness checks, data extraction, prioritization optimization, and appetite & guideline screening
Image Scoring: AI-powered property analysis covering exterior, perimeter, roof, foundation, and hazard detection
